monitor.capture_what: The bytes argument passed to pickle.loads() — the deserialized payload derived from user-controlled form input

oracle_check.condition_description: The bytes passed to pickle.loads() contain pickle opcodes indicating a crafted/malicious payload — specifically GLOBAL, REDUCE, or protocol header opcodes that can trigger arbitrary code execution
oracle_check.raise_message_template: UNSAFE_DESERIALIZATION: pickle.loads() received user-controlled pickle bytes — arbitrary code execution possible — captured={captured} pattern={matched_pattern}
